scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/fullscreen.js && node --check src/pwa.js && node --check service-worker.js && node --check src/core/game-contracts.js && node --check src/core/game-registry.js && node --check src/core/game-rules.js && node --check src/core/schema.js && node --check src/core/storage.js && node --check src/core/timer.js
scripts.assets:convert:demo: python scripts/convert_demo_photos.py && npm run assets:manifest && npm run thumbnails:generate && npm run demo:generate
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run lint && npm run assets:check && npm run assets:manifest:check && npm run thumbnails:check && npm run demo:check && npm test
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run test:e2e && node scripts/release-check.mjs
